candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Noncurrent assets balancing line, not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported current-assets total.

candidates.why: Balance-sheet cash line; best match for cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at year-end
candidates.why: Cash flow line for year-end cash, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of year
candidates.why: Cash flow line and wrong date for balance-sheet CHE.

candidates.row_label: Exchange-rate differences in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Not a stock of cash.

Not cash and cash equivalents.
Not cash and cash equivalents.

variables.notes: Preferred balance-sheet cash line over cash-flow statement cash lines.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Wrong maturity bucket.
Balancing line and noncurrent.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported current-liabilities total.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Best direct match to current debt while explicitly excluding leases, which matches the baseline STD definition.
Could include lease liabilities, so less preferred than the explicit excluding-leases line.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt including Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Includes capitalized leases, which should be excluded in baseline STD.
Lease liabilities are explicitly excluded from baseline STD.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Chose the explicit excluding-leases current debt line outside the shortlist. Did not use 'Current interest bearing liabilities' to avoid possible lease inclusion and double counting.

candidates.why: Exact match for current taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

Balancing line, not the clean reported PPE line.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease right-of-use asset component, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line for lease assets, not total PPE.
Wrong asset class.

candidates.row_label: Acquisition of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Cash flow capex, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Sales of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Cash flow disposal proceeds, not PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Realized G/L on Fixed Assets (PPE & Intangibles)
candidates.why: Income/cash-flow reconciliation item, not PPE stock.
Wrong statement and wrong asset class.

candidates.why: Operating cash flow before working-capital changes, not the final net operating cash flow requested.
